Apply Label Remapping to Plot Data (internal)

Source: R/theme.R
dot-apply_labels.Rd

Renames attribute and level values in a data frame using the label dictionaries from explicit arguments or global options.

Usage

.apply_labels(data, opts)

Arguments

data

Data frame with attribute and optionally level columns

opts

Options list from .resolve_plot_options()

Value

Modified data frame with relabeled values

On this page
